item.title: Jason Snell on Covering Apple for 33 Years 摘要
item.description:
Jason Snell recalls joining MacUser magazine in 1993, where he found the Mac transformative for his work as a writer and editor in print and online media. However, he quickly realized that Apple at the time was disorganized, as evidenced by a copy editor asking about layoffs on his first day, highlighting the turbulent nature of the media industry.
标签: Apple, Mac, media, journalism, history, technology, workplace, layoffs, 1990s, personal experience

item.title: ‘No, We’re Not Stupid. Our Dads Just Got Us Crummy Computers.’ 摘要
item.description:
The article discusses a 1991 Saturday Night Live parody ad called 'McIntosh Jr.', which the author considers the best Apple parody ever. It highlights the ad's message about Apple's core purpose: creating computers that enable users to do their best work, akin to 'bicycles for the mind'. The author notes its relevance to Apple's 50th anniversary and shares links to watch the ad, including a low-resolution version on Reddit and a higher-quality one on Peacock.
标签: Apple, parody, SNL, advertising, computers, history, culture, technology, media, humor

item.title: llm-gemini 0.30 摘要
item.description:
The llm-gemini plugin version 0.30 has been released, adding support for three new models: gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview, gemma-4-26b-a4b-it, and gemma-4-31b-it. This update expands the range of available models for users of the llm command-line tool, with the author providing additional notes on Gemma 4 models in a linked blog post.
标签: release, llm-gemini, gemini, gemma, AI, models, plugin, command-line, software-update, machine-learning

item.title: Gemma 4: Byte for byte, the most capable open models 摘要
item.description:
Google DeepMind released Gemma 4, a series of four new open-source vision-capable reasoning LLMs under Apache 2.0 license, including 2B, 4B, 31B, and a 26B-A4B Mixture-of-Experts model. The models emphasize high intelligence-per-parameter efficiency, with the smaller E2B and E4B models using Per-Layer Embeddings (PLE) to optimize for on-device deployment. Testing via LM Studio showed functional performance for most models, with quality improvements evident in tasks like generating SVG images of a pelican riding a bicycle. API access is available for the larger models through Google AI Studio.
标签: AI, LLM, open-source, Google, vision-models, reasoning, local-LLMs, model-efficiency, generative-AI, Gemma

item.title: Axios, Super Popular NPM Package, Was Compromised in Attack on the Module’s Maintainer 摘要
item.description:
The article details a sophisticated supply chain attack on the popular npm package axios, specifically versions 1.14.1 and 0.30.4. The attack involved injecting a malicious dependency, plain-crypto-js@4.2.1, which executes a postinstall script to deploy a cross-platform remote access trojan. The malware contacts a command-and-control server, delivers OS-specific payloads, and self-destructs, leaving no trace. This precision attack, staged 18 hours in advance and executed within 39 minutes, is noted as one of the most operationally sophisticated against a top-10 npm package, with historical context linking to past incidents in the JavaScript ecosystem.
标签: security, npm, supply-chain-attack, axios, malware, JavaScript, cybersecurity, open-source, dependency-management, devops

item.title: OpenAI, Supposedly Tightening Its Focus on Its Core Products, Buys Tech-Industry Talk Show TBPN 摘要
item.description:
OpenAI has acquired the tech-industry talk show TBPN to foster constructive dialogue about AI's societal impact and assist with the company's external communications and marketing, while TBPN will maintain editorial independence over its content and operations.
标签: AI, business, media, acquisition, OpenAI, marketing, communications, editorial independence, tech industry, public relations

item.title: The Blandness of Systematic Rules vs. The Delight of Localized Sensitivity 摘要
item.description:
The article discusses a 1997 ClarisWorks dialog with buttons labeled 'Never', 'Later', and 'Now', which violates the UX rule of making button text self-explanatory without context. While 'Never Register / Register Later / Register Now' would follow this rule, it loses the elegant terseness of the original design. The author explores the trade-off between adhering to systematic design rules and allowing localized, context-specific exceptions that can enhance delight and usability. They argue that rules provide consistency at scale but can stifle thoughtful, human-centered design, highlighting how automated decision-making in software often prioritizes scalability over nuanced, humane outcomes.
标签: UX Design, User Interface, Design Rules, Software Development, Human-Computer Interaction, Trade-offs, Scalability, Consistency, Delight, Context

item.title: Artemis II Crew on Way to Moon 摘要
item.description:
NASA's Artemis II mission crew—Reid Wiseman, Victor Glover, Christina Koch, and CSA astronaut Jeremy Hansen—is en route to the moon, marking the closest approach to a lunar return in 50 years. Despite criticism of the SLS rocket program's flaws, the mission represents a significant milestone in space exploration, with the crew scheduled to return in 10 days.
标签: NASA, Artemis II, space exploration, moon mission, SLS rocket, astronauts, lunar return, space agency, crewed mission, spaceflight

item.title: John Buck on the Invention of QuickTime 摘要
item.description:
The article recounts the invention of QuickTime at Apple in the early 1990s. Key figures like Steve Perlman, Gavin Miller, and others challenged the assumption that multimedia required expensive specialized hardware. During a lunchtime walk, Miller and Hoffert developed a software codec model that improved video quality and performance for small sizes. At WWDC 1990, Apple announced QuickTime without budget or staff, stunning attendees, but it shipped by WWDC 1991, teaching Apple that WWDC announcements must be delivered as promised.
标签: Apple, QuickTime, multimedia, software codec, innovation, WWDC, history, technology, compression, anecdote

item.title: Highlights from my conversation about agentic engineering on Lenny's Podcast 摘要
item.description:
Simon Willison discusses the AI inflection point in November 2025, where GPT 5.1 and Claude Opus 4.5 made coding agents reliable enough to produce working code consistently. He explores implications for software engineers as bellwethers, the rise of 'dark factories' with automated coding, the shift of bottlenecks to testing, and the mental exhaustion of managing multiple agents. Key themes include prototyping speed, responsible 'vibe coding', and challenges for other information workers like lawyers facing AI hallucinations.
标签: AI, LLM, coding agents, software engineering, automation, productivity, prototyping, testing, career impact, future of work

item.title: Automating starting Lambda Labs instances 摘要
item.description:
The author created a tool called lambda-manager to help secure GPU instances on Lambda Labs during high-demand periods. It includes commands to list available instance types, map friendly names to API identifiers, and automatically launch instances when they become available with Telegram notifications. The tool has been running for six hours without success, highlighting ongoing GPU scarcity.
标签: cloud, GPU, automation, devops, Lambda Labs, AI training, tooling, agentic coding, resource management, monitoring
